expectedClassifications.testName: Expect columns to be visible when filled with data - Systems tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source tests table visibility with no inline assertions (waitFor only). Target 'system card click' matches via shared route intercepts and has POM delegation with resolved assertions. Target weight > 2x source weight.

expectedClassifications.testName: Expect table to be empty if a team is not selected - Systems tab
expectedClassifications.notes: Source tests empty table state with not-found-message. Target has no empty-state test -- the systems integration spec starts from cards view after filter submission.
Source clicks sort buttons with no assertions. Target 'sorting USERS column' has route intercepts + POM methods with resolved assertions. Target weight > 2x source weight.
